arts.sum: Chelsea make the short trip to Craven Cottage to take on West London rivals Fulham this weekend. The Blues reached the Europa Conference League semi-finals on Thursday despite defeat at home to Legia Warsaw. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: David Ornstein reveals Enzo Maresca's eleven summer targets
arts.sum: Chelsea have at least 11 summer transfer targets for three different positions, according to David Ornstein. According to The Athletic transfer insider David Ornstein, Maresca is unlikely to be sacked this summer due to Chelsea's busy schedule with the Club World Cup and, on the contrary, he is actively involved in the planning for signings.
